description: Web dashboard for multi-agent system with AI chat, real-time monitoring, agent controls, and reasoning transparency

sessions.session_1: Specification complete, 74 issues created in Linear
sessions.session_2: Phase 1 Foundation: server, WebSocket, REST API, HTML dashboard, metrics collector
sessions.session_3: Phase 2 Real-Time: WebSocket broadcasting, metrics store, activity feed
sessions.session_4: Phase 3 Chat Interface: chat endpoint, history, streaming, code blocks, provider switcher
sessions.session_5: Phase 4 Multi-Provider: provider status, model selector, environment config
sessions.session_6: Phase 5 Agent Controls: pause/resume, agent status, agent detail view
sessions.session_7: Phase 6 Transparency: reasoning stream, decision log, pipeline visualization
